free_text: The targets were typically 80 mu-g/cm2 metallic
neodymium on 5 mu-g/cm2 carbon backing. No Nd isotope
other than 144Nd was present in more than 0.5%
The scattered particles were detected by an
array of four surface-barrier detectors cooled to
-15 degrees C at lab. angles of 170, 155, 140 and 125
No information on source of uncertainty.
The reaction products were detected by two
detectors mounted 10 degrees apart on the
collimators subtended about 2 degrees in the
scattering plane. The energy resolutions were 15.5
and 17.5 keV for the two detectors.
No information on source of uncertainty.
